NAME AGE GENDER HEIGHT WEIGHT REPORT ID
Amit 21 year(s) Male 183 cm 85 kg 1771669199672820
ECG Parameters AI POWERED Result Details AI POWERED
Overall evaluation of test
Parameter Observed Values Standard Range Abnormal ECG
Interpretation Details
PR Interval 116 ms 100 ms - 200 ms
Borderline
QRS Interval 87 ms 60 ms - 120 ms Anomalies in test reports
ST elevation in v4 (0.39mV),
QT Interval 356 ms 300 ms - 450 ms
Suggested Action
If symptoms like chest pain, palpitations, shortness of breath and dizziness is felt,Intake
QTc Interval 401 ms 300 ms - 450 ms a tablet of Aspirin 150mg and consult your physician.If ECG is abnormal without
symptoms, closely monitor your ECG in every three hours,If abnormality persists, consult
your physician.Recommended Evaluation Test,Echocardiogram/Exercise ECG.
Heart Rate 76 bpm 60 bpm - 100 bpm
Risk Meter
Low risk Moderate risk High risk
This is a computer-generated ECG interpretation. Clinical validation by a licensed healthcare
professional is required.
Disclaimer: NOT FOR COMMERCIAL USE | Medical advice asked and accepted on the internet (without physically examining the patient) is at patient’s own risk. Visit a doctor in case of emergency.
Note: This report is generated using Spandan portable ECG device .To know more about Spandan visit www.sunfox.in/spandan or call at (+91) 7060000556 Page: 1 of 2
